---
title: "Exploratory graphics"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document: default
date: "2026-01-06"
---



```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

```



## R Markdown



```{r}

library(data.table)

library(ggplot2)

theme_set(theme_minimal()) # personal preference - feel free to change!

```



```{r}

# # CHANGE THIS to match the data path on your computer
# 
# datadir <- "C:/Users/17790/Desktop/BIO629/msk_chord_2024/msk_chord_2024/"
# 
# 
# 
# # Load the data
# 
# clin_patient <- fread(paste0(datadir, "data_clinical_patient.txt"), skip = 4)
# 
# clin_sample  <- fread(paste0(datadir, "data_clinical_sample.txt"), skip = 4)
# 
# muta <- fread(paste0(datadir, "data_mutations.txt"))
# 
# cna  <- fread(paste0(datadir, "data_cna.txt"))
# 
# sv   <- fread(paste0(datadir, "data_sv.txt"))

```

```{r}
library(data.table)

# 基础 URL 路径
base_url <- "https://media.githubusercontent.com/media/cBioPortal/datahub/master/public/msk_chord_2024/"

# 1. Load Clinical Patient Data
clin_patient <- fread(paste0(base_url, "data_clinical_patient.txt"), skip = 4)

# 2. Load Clinical Sample Data
clin_sample  <- fread(paste0(base_url, "data_clinical_sample.txt"), skip = 4)

# 3. Load Mutation Data
muta <- fread(paste0(base_url, "data_mutations.txt"))

# 4. Load CNA (Copy Number Alteration) Data
cna  <- fread(paste0(base_url, "data_cna.txt"))

# 5. Load SV (Structural Variant) Data
sv   <- fread(paste0(base_url, "data_sv.txt"))
```


# What do we have?



Sample-level information

```{r}

colnames(clin_sample)

```



Patient-level information

```{r}

colnames(clin_patient)

```

```{r}
# 1. 筛选出所有非小细胞肺癌的样本 ID
target_type <- "Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer"
nsclc_samples <- clin_sample[CANCER_TYPE == target_type, SAMPLE_ID]

# 2. 过滤突变数据
muta_sub <- muta[Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% nsclc_samples]

# 3. 过滤拷贝数变异 (CNA) 数据
# 仅保留第一列基因名和属于 NSCLC 的样本列
cna_sub <- cna[, .SD, .SDcols = c("Hugo_Symbol", intersect(names(cna), nsclc_samples))]

# 4. 过滤临床数据
clin_sample_sub <- clin_sample[CANCER_TYPE == target_type]
# 获取对应的病人数并过滤病人表
nsclc_patients <- unique(clin_sample_sub$PATIENT_ID)
clin_patient_sub <- clin_patient[PATIENT_ID %in% nsclc_patients]

cat("筛选完成：现在你有", length(nsclc_samples), "个肺癌样本。")
```
```{r}
# 肺癌关键基因 CNA 变异频率汇总统计

# 1. 定义肺癌核心基因（癌基因 + 抑癌基因）
target_genes <- c("EGFR", "MYC", "KRAS", "CDKN2A", "PTEN", "TP53", "RB1")

# 2. 提取数据并计算每个基因的变异比例
cna_summary_data <- cna_sub[Hugo_Symbol %in% target_genes]

# 将数据转为长格式进行统计
cna_melted <- melt(cna_summary_data, id.vars = "Hugo_Symbol", variable.name = "Sample", value.name = "Level")

# 统计每个基因在不同 Level 的百分比
# Level: -2 (深删), -1 (浅删), 0 (正常), 1 (浅扩), 2 (深扩)
summary_stats <- cna_melted[, .(Count = .N), by = .(Hugo_Symbol, Level)]
summary_stats[, Percentage := (Count / length(nsclc_samples)) * 100]

# 3. 过滤掉 Level 0 (正常二倍体)，我们只看变异的部分
plot_stats <- summary_stats[Level != 0]

# 4. 绘图：展示这些基因在肺癌中的变异分布
ggplot(plot_stats, aes(x = reorder(Hugo_Symbol, -Percentage), y = Percentage, fill = factor(Level))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("-2"="#053061", "-1"="#2166AC", "1"="#D6604D", "2"="#B2182B"),
                    labels = c("HomDel (-2)", "HetLoss (-1)", "Gain (1)", "Amp (2)"),
                    name = "CNA Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "CNA Frequency in Lung Cancer (NSCLC)",
       subtitle = paste("Based on", length(nsclc_samples), "samples. Showing key drivers."),
       x = "Genes", y = "Frequency of Alteration (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
```{r}
# Survival Analysis: Impact of CDKN2A Deletion in Lung Cancer

# 1. 提取 CDKN2A 的 CNA 状态
cdkn2a_status <- cna_sub[Hugo_Symbol == "CDKN2A", -1, with=FALSE]
cdkn2a_status <- t(cdkn2a_status)
colnames(cdkn2a_status) <- "CNA_Level"
cdkn2a_df <- data.frame(SAMPLE_ID = rownames(cdkn2a_status), 
                        Group = ifelse(cdkn2a_status[,1] == -2, "CDKN2A_HomDel", "Others"))

# 2. 合并临床生存数据
# 注意：需要把 SAMPLE_ID 转换或匹配到 PATIENT_ID
clin_sub <- clin_sample_sub[, .(SAMPLE_ID, PATIENT_ID)]
surv_data_merged <- merge(cdkn2a_df, clin_sub, by = "SAMPLE_ID")
surv_final <- merge(surv_data_merged, clin_patient_sub, by = "PATIENT_ID")

# 3. 准备生存变量
surv_final$OS_STATUS_NUM <- ifelse(grepl("DECEASED", surv_final$OS_STATUS, ignore.case = TRUE), 1, 0)
surv_final$OS_MONTHS <- as.numeric(surv_final$OS_MONTHS)

# 4. 运行生存曲线
library(survival)
library(survminer)

fit <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~ Group, data = surv_final)

# 5. 绘图
ggsurvplot(fit, data = surv_final,
           pval = TRUE,             # 显示 P 值
           conf.int = TRUE,         # 显示置信区间
           risk.table = TRUE,       # 显示风险表
           title = "Survival Impact of CDKN2A Deep Deletion in NSCLC",
           legend.labs = c("CDKN2A Deep Deletion", "Others/WT"),
           palette = c("#053061", "#D1D1D1"))
```
```{r}
# 严格执行 PPT 规划：识别 Top 50 高频变异基因

# 1. 提取突变最频繁的 Top 50
top_mutations_50 <- muta_sub[, .N, by = Hugo_Symbol][order(-N)][1:50, Hugo_Symbol]

# 2. 提取 CNA 变异（增益或缺失）最频繁的 Top 50
cna_freq_all <- rowSums(cna_sub[, -1, with=FALSE] != 0, na.rm = TRUE) / ncol(cna_sub[,-1])
cna_freq_df <- data.frame(Hugo_Symbol = cna_sub$Hugo_Symbol, Freq = cna_freq_all)
top_cna_50 <- cna_freq_df[order(-cna_freq_df$Freq), ][1:50, "Hugo_Symbol"]

# 3. 合并并去重，得到最终进入 Lasso 的候选池
candidate_genes_50 <- unique(c(top_mutations_50, top_cna_50))

cat("第一步完成：根据 PPT 逻辑，已筛选出", length(candidate_genes_50), "个基因进入候选池。\n")
```
```{r}
# Step 2: Binary Transformation & Final Matrix Assembly

# 1. 提取生存和临床基础数据 (满足 PPT 中的 Clinical Data Cleaning 逻辑)
# 剔除 OS_MONTHS 为缺失或非正值的病人
final_clinic <- clin_patient_sub[!is.na(OS_MONTHS) & OS_MONTHS > 0, 
                                 .(PATIENT_ID, OS_MONTHS = as.numeric(OS_MONTHS), 
                                   OS_STATUS_NUM = ifelse(grepl("DECEASED", OS_STATUS), 1, 0),
                                   AGE = as.numeric(CURRENT_AGE_DEID),
                                   GENDER = ifelse(GENDER == "Female", 1, 0))]

# 2. 为 93 个候选基因构建 0/1 矩阵
# 初始化一个全为 0 的矩阵，行名为病人 ID，列名为基因名
gene_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(final_clinic), ncol = length(candidate_genes_50),
                      dimnames = list(final_clinic$PATIENT_ID, candidate_genes_50))

# 填充突变信息 (Muta -> 1)
# 获取子集样本对应的病人 ID
nsclc_muta_patients <- clin_sample_sub[SAMPLE_ID %in% muta_sub$Tumor_Sample_Barcode, .(SAMPLE_ID, PATIENT_ID)]
muta_with_patient <- merge(muta_sub, nsclc_muta_patients, by.x = "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", by.y = "SAMPLE_ID")

for(g in intersect(candidate_genes_50, unique(muta_with_patient$Hugo_Symbol))) {
  pts_with_muta <- unique(muta_with_patient[Hugo_Symbol == g, PATIENT_ID])
  gene_matrix[rownames(gene_matrix) %in% pts_with_muta, g] <- 1
}

# 填充 CNA 信息 (CNA != 0 -> 1)
# 注意：CNA 数据列名通常是 SAMPLE_ID，需要映射到 PATIENT_ID
sample_to_patient <- clin_sample_sub[, .(SAMPLE_ID, PATIENT_ID)]
for(g in intersect(candidate_genes_50, cna_sub$Hugo_Symbol)) {
  # 提取该基因在所有样本中的 Level
  gene_levels <- unlist(cna_sub[Hugo_Symbol == g, -1, with=FALSE])
  # 找到 Level != 0 的样本 ID
  altered_samples <- names(gene_levels)[!is.na(gene_levels) & gene_levels != 0]
  # 映射到病人 ID
  altered_patients <- sample_to_patient[SAMPLE_ID %in% altered_samples, PATIENT_ID]
  gene_matrix[rownames(gene_matrix) %in% altered_patients, g] <- 1
}

# 3. 合并临床与基因数据，得到最终分析数据集 (Final Analytic Dataset)
final_analytic_df <- cbind(final_clinic, as.data.frame(gene_matrix))

cat("第二步完成！\n")
cat("最终矩阵维度:", nrow(final_analytic_df), "行 (病人) x", ncol(final_analytic_df), "列 (变量)。\n")
```
```{r}
# # 检查每一列有多少个缺失值
# na_counts <- colSums(is.na(final_analytic_df))
# print(na_counts[na_counts > 0])

# Step 3: Lasso-Cox Modeling & Feature Selection
# 1. 剔除那 1 个年龄缺失的病人 (方案 A)
final_analytic_df_clean <- na.omit(final_analytic_df)

cat("清理完成：剔除了 1 个缺失年龄的样本，剩余样本量：", nrow(final_analytic_df_clean), "\n")

# 2. 重新准备 Lasso 矩阵
# X 包含年龄、性别和所有 93 个基因变量
x_vars <- as.matrix(final_analytic_df_clean[, -c(1:3)]) 
y_outcome <- Surv(final_analytic_df_clean$OS_MONTHS, final_analytic_df_clean$OS_STATUS_NUM)

# 3. 再次运行带交叉验证的 Lasso-Cox
library(glmnet)
set.seed(629) # 保持随机种子一致
cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(x_vars, y_outcome, family = "cox", alpha = 1, nfolds = 10)

# 4. 绘制结果图
plot(cv_lasso)

# 5. 查看筛选出的特征
best_lambda <- cv_lasso$lambda.min
lasso_coefs <- coef(cv_lasso, s = "lambda.min")
selected_features <- row.names(lasso_coefs)[as.numeric(lasso_coefs) != 0]

cat("Lasso 筛选出的最终特征数量：", length(selected_features), "\n")
print(selected_features)
```
```{r}
#Step 4: Final Model Building & Comparison

# 1. 构建基础临床模型 (Baseline Clinical Model)
model_clinical <- coxph(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~ AGE + GENDER, 
                        data = final_analytic_df_clean)

# 2. 构建整合模型 (Clinicogenomic Model)
# 自动生成公式：使用 Lasso 选出的 48 个特征
# 使用 backticks 包裹每一个特征名称，防止连字符被解析为减法
formula_full <- as.formula(paste("Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~", 
                                 paste(paste0("`", selected_features, "`"), collapse = " + ")))

# 然后重新运行模型
model_full <- coxph(formula_full, data = final_analytic_df_clean)

# 3. 计算 C-index (预测准确度) 进行对比
c_index_clinical <- summary(model_clinical)$concordance[1]
c_index_full <- summary(model_full)$concordance[1]

# 4. 进行似然比检验 (Likelihood Ratio Test) 验证显著性
lrt_test <- anova(model_clinical, model_full)

cat("基础模型 C-index:", round(c_index_clinical, 3), "\n")
cat("整合模型 C-index:", round(c_index_full, 3), "\n")
print(lrt_test)
```
```{r}
# 检查 PH 假设
ph_test <- cox.zph(model_full)
print(ph_test)
plot(ph_test) # 如果曲线基本平直，则假设成立
```

```{r}

library(ComplexHeatmap)

# 1. 选取 Top 10 基因
top_10_genes <- candidate_genes_50[1:10]

# 2. 选取变异最活跃的前 100 个样本
sample_activity <- rowSums(gene_matrix)
top_100_samples <- names(sort(sample_activity, decreasing = TRUE))[1:100]

# 3. 准备绘图矩阵
heatmap_mat <- t(gene_matrix[top_100_samples, top_10_genes])

# 4. 绘图 (修复了 Legend 错误)
Heatmap(heatmap_mat, 
        name = "Status", 
        col = c("0" = "#F7F7F7", "1" = "#B2182B"), 
        column_title = "NSCLC: Mutation Landscape (Top 100 Samples)",
        row_title = "Top 10 Genomic Drivers",
        show_column_names = FALSE, 
        cluster_rows = TRUE, 
        cluster_columns = TRUE,
        rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 0.5),
        # 核心修复部分：明确指定 at 和 labels 的对应关系
        heatmap_legend_param = list(
          at = c(0, 1), 
          labels = c("Wild-type", "Altered")
        ))
```
```{r}
# 1. 共突变分析 (Co-mutation Analysis)
library(corrplot)

# 核心修复：只选取那些确实存在于 gene_matrix 列名中的 Lasso 特征
# 这样可以避免“下标出界”错误
valid_genes <- selected_features[selected_features %in% colnames(gene_matrix)]

# 如果有效基因太少，则补齐前 20 个变异最频繁的基因
if(length(valid_genes) < 5) {
  valid_genes <- colnames(gene_matrix)[1:20]
} else {
  valid_genes <- valid_genes[1:min(20, length(valid_genes))]
}

# 提取子矩阵
mat_sub <- gene_matrix[, valid_genes]

# 初始化 or_matrix (优势比矩阵)
n_genes <- length(valid_genes)
or_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = n_genes, ncol = n_genes, 
                    dimnames = list(valid_genes, valid_genes))

# 循环计算 Log2 Odds Ratio
for (i in 1:n_genes) {
  for (j in 1:n_genes) {
    if (i == j) {
      or_matrix[i, j] <- 0 
    } else {
      # 创建 2x2 联列表，确保因子水平正确
      tab <- table(factor(mat_sub[, i], levels = c(0, 1)), 
                   factor(mat_sub[, j], levels = c(0, 1)))
      
      # 加上 0.5 修正防止除以 0
      a <- tab[2, 2]; b <- tab[2, 1]; c <- tab[1, 2]; d <- tab[1, 1]
      odds_ratio <- ((a + 0.5) * (d + 0.5)) / ((b + 0.5) * (c + 0.5))
      or_matrix[i, j] <- log2(odds_ratio)
    }
  }
}

# 绘图
diag(or_matrix) <- NA 
limit_val <- max(abs(range(or_matrix, na.rm = TRUE)))

corrplot(or_matrix, 
         method = "color", type = "upper", is.corr = FALSE,
         col.lim = c(-limit_val, limit_val), 
         tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45, addCoef.col = "black",
         number.cex = 0.6, na.label = " ",
         col = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "#F7F7F7", "#B2182B"))(200),
         title = "Co-mutation Analysis (Log2 Odds Ratio)",
         mar = c(0,0,2,0))
```
```{r}
# 1. 模型进阶：随机生存森林 (RSF) 

library(ranger)
library(survival)

# --- 核心修复：确保数据维度和列名 ---

# 1. 检查有效基因是否存在，如果不存在则报错提醒，防止后续崩溃
if (length(valid_genes) == 0) {
  stop("错误：没有找到有效的基因特征，请检查 valid_genes 是否生成成功。")
}

# 2. 提取数据（明确指定 drop = FALSE 防止降维）
target_cols <- c("OS_MONTHS", "OS_STATUS_NUM", valid_genes)
# 确保只提取存在的列
target_cols <- target_cols[target_cols %in% colnames(final_analytic_df_clean)]

rsf_data_raw <- final_analytic_df_clean[, ..target_cols] # 使用 data.table 的写法确保稳定

# 3. 强制转换列名（处理特殊字符）
# 先检查维度，确保 rsf_data_raw 是个矩阵或数据框
if (ncol(rsf_data_raw) >= 2) {
    setnames(rsf_data_raw, make.names(colnames(rsf_data_raw)))
} else {
    stop("数据提取失败：rsf_data_raw 的列数不足。")
}

# 4. 清理缺失值并转换回 data.frame (ranger 对 data.frame 兼容性最高)
rsf_data_final <- as.data.frame(na.omit(rsf_data_raw))

# --- 运行模型 ---
# 自动生成公式
final_cols <- colnames(rsf_data_final)
feature_cols <- final_cols[!final_cols %in% c("OS_MONTHS", "OS_STATUS_NUM")]
rsf_formula <- as.formula(paste("Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~", 
                                paste(feature_cols, collapse = " + ")))

rsf_nsclc <- ranger(
  formula = rsf_formula,
  data = rsf_data_final,
  num.trees = 500,
  importance = "permutation",
  seed = 629
)

# --- 输出对比 ---
c_index_rsf <- 1 - rsf_nsclc$prediction.error

cat("\n==========================================\n")
cat("       Interim Project 模型性能报告       \n")
cat("==========================================\n")
cat("A. 基础临床模型 C-index: 0.572\n") 
cat("B. Lasso-Cox 整合模型 C-index: 0.644\n") 
cat("C. 随机生存森林(RSF) C-index:", round(c_index_rsf, 3), "\n")
cat("==========================================\n")
```


```{r}
# 整合变异数据与临床样本信息 (LUAD vs LUSC)
muta_with_patient <- merge(
    muta,
    clin_sample[, .(SAMPLE_ID, PATIENT_ID, CANCER_TYPE)],
    by.x = "Tumor_Sample_Barcode",
    by.y = "SAMPLE_ID",
    all.x = TRUE
)

# 计算每个癌症类型中，每个基因出现的频次
forplot <- muta_with_patient[, .N, by = .(Hugo_Symbol, CANCER_TYPE)]

# 可视化：不同亚型的变异负荷对比
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(forplot, aes(x = CANCER_TYPE, y = N)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.3, color = "#B2182B") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Mutation Counts by Cancer Type", x = "Cancer Subtype", y = "Number of Mutations")
```
```{r}
#提取并绘制随机森林的变量重要性
library(ggplot2)

# 1. 提取重要性数据
importance_df <- data.frame(
  Gene = names(rsf_nsclc$variable.importance),
  Importance = rsf_nsclc$variable.importance
)

# 2. 选取前 15 个最重要的基因进行展示
importance_df <- importance_df[order(-importance_df$Importance), ][1:15, ]

# 3. 绘图
ggplot(importance_df, aes(x = reorder(Gene, Importance), y = Importance)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#B2182B") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Top 15 Most Important Features (RSF)",
       subtitle = "Genes with highest impact on survival prediction",
       x = "Gene Symbol", y = "Permutation Importance")
```
```{r}
# 修复版：提取 1年生存概率进行可视化
# 1. 提取预测对象
rsf_pred_obj <- predict(rsf_nsclc, data = rsf_data_final)

# 2. 找到最接近 365 天（1年）的时间索引
time_idx <- which.min(abs(rsf_pred_obj$unique.death.times - 365))

# 3. 提取 1年生存率 (Prob)
# 注意：生存率越高，风险越低
rsf_risk_fix <- data.frame(
  SurvProb_1yr = rsf_pred_obj$survival[, time_idx],
  Status = factor(rsf_data_final$OS_STATUS_NUM, labels = c("Alive", "Deceased"))
)

# 4. 绘图：展示生存概率的分布差异
ggplot(rsf_risk_fix, aes(x = Status, y = SurvProb_1yr, fill = Status)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.6) + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8) + # 调低散点透明度
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Alive" = "#2166AC", "Deceased" = "#B2182B")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Model Discrimination: Predicted 1-Year Survival",
       subtitle = "Deceased patients should have lower predicted survival probabilities",
       x = "Actual Survival Status", 
       y = "Predicted Survival Probability (at 1 Year)")
```

```{r}
# 3: EGFR 突变在不同亚型中的分布
# 假设你的 muta_with_patient 已经生成
egfr_dist <- muta_with_patient[Hugo_Symbol == "EGFR", .N, by = CANCER_TYPE]

ggplot(muta_with_patient[Hugo_Symbol %in% c("EGFR", "KRAS", "TP53")], 
       aes(x = CANCER_TYPE, fill = Hugo_Symbol)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Driver Mutation Distribution by Cancer Subtype",
       y = "Proportion of Mutations", x = "")
```
```{r}
# 3. CNA Profile Comparison
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)

# 1. 准备数据：提取 CNA 矩阵（去掉 Hugo_Symbol 列进行计算）
cna_data <- as.matrix(cna[, -1, with=FALSE])
rownames(cna_data) <- cna$Hugo_Symbol

# 2. 自动选取变异最活跃的 2 个样本（或者你手动指定 IDs）
# 这里我们选变异频率（绝对值之和）最高的两个样本
sample_activity <- colSums(abs(cna_data), na.rm = TRUE)
target_samples <- names(sort(sample_activity, decreasing = TRUE)[1:2])

# 3. 自动选取变异最显著的前 15 个基因
gene_activity <- rowSums(abs(cna_data[, target_samples]), na.rm = TRUE)
target_genes <- names(sort(gene_activity, decreasing = TRUE)[1:15])

# 4. 提取并转换数据格式（从 Wide 到 Long）
cna_sub_mat <- cna_data[target_genes, target_samples, drop = FALSE]
df_cna <- as.data.frame(cna_sub_mat)
df_cna$Gene <- rownames(df_cna)

df_long <- melt(as.data.table(df_cna), id.vars = "Gene", 
                variable.name = "Sample", value.name = "CNA_Level")

# 5. 定义 CNA 状态标签
df_long[, Status := factor(CNA_Level, 
                           levels = c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2),
                           labels = c("Deep Deletion", "Loss", "Neutral", "Gain", "Amplification"))]

# 6. 绘图
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = reorder(Gene, -abs(CNA_Level)), y = CNA_Level, fill = Status)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~Sample, ncol = 1) + # 分成上下两个面板对比
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Deep Deletion" = "#053061", 
                               "Loss" = "#2166AC", 
                               "Neutral" = "#F7F7F7", 
                               "Gain" = "#D6604D", 
                               "Amplification" = "#B2182B")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  labs(title = "CNA Profile Comparison: Genomic Heterogeneity",
       subtitle = paste("Comparing copy number patterns of", target_samples[1], "and", target_samples[2]),
       x = "Gene Symbol", y = "Copy Number Level (-2 to +2)")
```
```{r}
# 3. CNA Profile Comparison
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)

# 1. 准备数据：提取 CNA 矩阵（去掉 Hugo_Symbol 列进行计算）
cna_data <- as.matrix(cna[, -1, with=FALSE])
rownames(cna_data) <- cna$Hugo_Symbol

# 2. （或者你手动指定 IDs）
# 选取缺失最多的样本
sample_del <- names(which.min(colSums(cna_data, na.rm = TRUE)))
# 选取扩增最多的样本
sample_amp <- names(which.max(colSums(cna_data, na.rm = TRUE)))
target_samples <- c(sample_del, sample_amp)

# 3. 自动选取变异最显著的前 15 个基因
gene_activity <- rowSums(abs(cna_data[, target_samples]), na.rm = TRUE)
target_genes <- names(sort(gene_activity, decreasing = TRUE)[1:15])

# 4. 提取并转换数据格式（从 Wide 到 Long）
cna_sub_mat <- cna_data[target_genes, target_samples, drop = FALSE]
df_cna <- as.data.frame(cna_sub_mat)
df_cna$Gene <- rownames(df_cna)

df_long <- melt(as.data.table(df_cna), id.vars = "Gene", 
                variable.name = "Sample", value.name = "CNA_Level")

# 5. 定义 CNA 状态标签
df_long[, Status := factor(CNA_Level, 
                           levels = c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2),
                           labels = c("Deep Deletion", "Loss", "Neutral", "Gain", "Amplification"))]

# 6. 绘图
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = reorder(Gene, -abs(CNA_Level)), y = CNA_Level, fill = Status)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~Sample, ncol = 1) + # 分成上下两个面板对比
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Deep Deletion" = "#053061", 
                               "Loss" = "#2166AC", 
                               "Neutral" = "#F7F7F7", 
                               "Gain" = "#D6604D", 
                               "Amplification" = "#B2182B")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  labs(title = "CNA Profile Comparison: Genomic Heterogeneity",
       subtitle = paste("Comparing copy number patterns of", target_samples[1], "and", target_samples[2]),
       x = "Gene Symbol", y = "Copy Number Level (-2 to +2)")
```
#Final Project
```{r}
# 新项目延展：免疫治疗反应预测 (Immunotherapy Response Prediction)
# 核心指标：TMB 计算 与 STK11/KEAP1 变异状态整合

# 1. 计算肿瘤突变负荷 (TMB)
# TMB 定义：非同步体细胞突变总数 / 测序覆盖区域大小 (假设覆盖大小为 38Mb，即全外显子组 WES 的常用标准)
seq_size_mb <- 38 

# 统计每个样本的突变总数
tmb_counts <- muta_sub[, .(Mut_Count = .N), by = Tumor_Sample_Barcode]
tmb_counts[, TMB_Score := Mut_Count / seq_size_mb]

# 2. 提取 STK11 和 KEAP1 的变异状态 (突变 + CNA)
# 我们定义 "Altered" 为：存在非同步突变 OR 存在深删(HomDel, -2)
target_immuno_genes <- c("STK11", "KEAP1")

# (A) 从突变数据提取
muta_immuno <- muta_sub[Hugo_Symbol %in% target_immuno_genes, 
                        .(Has_Mutation = 1), 
                        by = .(Tumor_Sample_Barcode, Hugo_Symbol)]

# (B) 从 CNA 数据提取 (深删状态)
cna_immuno <- cna_sub[Hugo_Symbol %in% target_immuno_genes]
cna_immuno_melted <- melt(cna_immuno, id.vars = "Hugo_Symbol", 
                          variable.name = "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", value.name = "CNA_Level")
cna_immuno_homdel <- cna_immuno_melted[CNA_Level == -2, .(Has_HomDel = 1), 
                                       by = .(Tumor_Sample_Barcode, Hugo_Symbol)]

# (C) 合并为基因状态矩阵
immuno_status_raw <- merge(muta_immuno, cna_immuno_homdel, 
                           by = c("Tumor_Sample_Barcode", "Hugo_Symbol"), all = TRUE)
immuno_status_raw[is.na(Has_Mutation), Has_Mutation := 0]
immuno_status_raw[is.na(Has_HomDel), Has_HomDel := 0]
immuno_status_raw[, Is_Altered := ifelse(Has_Mutation == 1 | Has_HomDel == 1, 1, 0)]

# 转为宽格式：每个样本一行，列为 STK11 和 KEAP1 的状态
immuno_gene_matrix <- dcast(immuno_status_raw, Tumor_Sample_Barcode ~ Hugo_Symbol, 
                            value.var = "Is_Altered", fill = 0)

# 3. 整合 TMB 与基因状态 (Final Immuno-Analytic Dataset)
immuno_df <- merge(tmb_counts[, .(Tumor_Sample_Barcode, TMB_Score)], 
                   immuno_gene_matrix, 
                   by = "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", all.x = TRUE)

# 处理缺失值：如果在变异表中没查到，则视为 Wild-type (0)
immuno_df[is.na(STK11), STK11 := 0]
immuno_df[is.na(KEAP1), KEAP1 := 0]

# 4. 定义联合分组 (Stratification Plan)
# 高 TMB 定义为样本的前 20% (或使用常用阈值 10)
tmb_cutoff <- quantile(immuno_df$TMB_Score, 0.8)
immuno_df[, TMB_Group := ifelse(TMB_Score >= tmb_cutoff, "High TMB", "Low TMB")]

# 定义 STK11/KEAP1 联合状态
immuno_df[, Gene_Status := "Wild-type"]
immuno_df[STK11 == 1 | KEAP1 == 1, Gene_Status := "STK11/KEAP1 Altered"]

# 5. 可视化：TMB 与基因状态的关系
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(immuno_df, aes(x = Gene_Status, y = log2(TMB_Score + 1), fill = Gene_Status)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.2, size = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Wild-type" = "#2166AC", "STK11/KEAP1 Altered" = "#B2182B")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "TMB Distribution by STK11/KEAP1 Status",
         subtitle = paste("NSCLC samples from MSK-CHORD (N =", nrow(immuno_df), ")"),
         x = "Genomic Status", y = "log2(TMB Score + 1)")

# 6. 生存分析 (Survival Stratification)
# 合并生存数据 (利用你之前的 clin_sample_sub 和 clin_patient_sub)
surv_base <- merge(clin_sample_sub[, .(SAMPLE_ID, PATIENT_ID)], 
                   clin_patient_sub[, .(PATIENT_ID, OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS)], 
                   by = "PATIENT_ID")

surv_immuno <- merge(immuno_df, surv_base, by.x = "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", by.y = "SAMPLE_ID")

# 准备生存变量并绘图
library(survival)
library(survminer)
surv_immuno[, OS_STATUS_NUM := ifelse(grepl("DECEASED", OS_STATUS, ignore.case = TRUE), 1, 0)]
surv_immuno[, OS_MONTHS := as.numeric(OS_MONTHS)]

# 按 TMB 组和基因状态组进行复合分层
surv_immuno[, Combined_Group := paste(TMB_Group, "|", Gene_Status)]
fit_immuno <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~ Combined_Group, data = surv_immuno)

ggsurvplot(fit_immuno, data = surv_immuno,
           pval = TRUE, conf.int = FALSE,
           title = "Survival by TMB and STK11/KEAP1 Status",
           legend.title = "Risk Groups",
           palette = "jco")
```

```{r}
# 1. 提取正确的临床协变量
# 我们把 CURRENT_AGE_DEID 提取出来并重命名为 AGE，方便后续分析
clin_fix <- clin_patient[, .(PATIENT_ID, 
                             AGE = as.numeric(CURRENT_AGE_DEID), 
                             GENDER_FIX = GENDER)]

# 2. 合并到现有的分析表中
# all.x = TRUE 确保不会丢失你之前算好的 TMB 和基因状态
surv_immuno <- merge(surv_immuno, clin_fix, by = "PATIENT_ID", all.x = TRUE)

# 3. 处理性别列（防止列名冲突）
surv_immuno[, GENDER := GENDER_FIX]

# 4. 运行 Cox 模型
library(survival)
library(survminer)

# 确保因子水平以 Wild-type 为基准
surv_immuno$Gene_Status <- factor(surv_immuno$Gene_Status)
if("Wild-type" %in% levels(surv_immuno$Gene_Status)) {
  surv_immuno$Gene_Status <- relevel(surv_immuno$Gene_Status, ref = "Wild-type")
}

# 使用修正后的变量名运行模型
cox_immuno <- coxph(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~ TMB_Group + STK11 + KEAP1 + AGE + GENDER, 
                    data = surv_immuno)

# 5. 输出结果与森林图
print(summary(cox_immuno))

ggforest(cox_immuno, data = surv_immuno, 
         main = "Hazard Ratio: Impact of TMB and STK11/KEAP1 Mutations")
```

```{r}
# 2. 交互作用探测：STK11 与 KEAP1 的协同效应

# 统计四种组合的样本量
table(surv_immuno$STK11, surv_immuno$KEAP1)

# 构建带交互项的模型
cox_interaction <- coxph(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~ STK11 * KEAP1 + TMB_Score, 
                         data = surv_immuno)

# 提取交互项 P 值：如果 P < 0.05，说明两者具有生物学协同预测价值
interaction_p <- summary(cox_interaction)$coefficients["STK11:KEAP1", "Pr(>|z|)"]
cat("STK11 与 KEAP1 的协同效应 P 值:", interaction_p, "\n")
```

```{r}
# 3. 构建整合免疫预测得分 (Immuno-Score)

# 简单的线性加权得分：TMB 贡献正向分，耐药基因突变贡献负向分
# 这里利用 Cox 模型的系数作为权重
weights <- coef(cox_immuno)

surv_immuno[, Immuno_Score := (weights["TMB_GroupHigh TMB"] * (TMB_Group == "High TMB")) +
                               (weights["STK11"] * STK11) + 
                               (weights["KEAP1"] * KEAP1)]

# 绘制得分分布：对比死亡组与生存组
ggplot(surv_immuno, aes(x = OS_STATUS, y = Immuno_Score, fill = OS_STATUS)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Composite Immuno-Score Distribution",
         subtitle = "Higher score indicates higher predicted risk based on TMB and Mutations")
```
```{r}
# 1. 基因变异共现性可视化 (Co-occurrence)
library(grid)
library(futile.logger)
library(VennDiagram)

# 提取突变样本名单
stk11_samples <- surv_immuno[STK11 == 1, PATIENT_ID]
keap1_samples <- surv_immuno[KEAP1 == 1, PATIENT_ID]

# 绘制 Venn 图
grid.newpage()
venn_plot <- draw.pairwise.venn(
  area1 = length(stk11_samples),
  area2 = length(keap1_samples),
  cross.area = nrow(surv_immuno[STK11 == 1 & KEAP1 == 1]),
  category = c("STK11 Mut", "KEAP1 Mut"),
  fill = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8"),
  alpha = 0.6,
  cat.pos = c(-20, 20),
  cat.dist = 0.05
)
# 这一步会直接在 Plots 窗口生成图，你可以截图放入 PPT 第 4 页
```

```{r}
# 热图：整合 TMB 与基因状态
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# 计算统计指标
heatmap_data <- surv_immuno %>%
  group_by(TMB_Group, Gene_Status) %>%
  summarise(
    Death_Rate = mean(OS_STATUS_NUM, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_OS = median(OS_MONTHS, na.rm = TRUE),
    Count = n(),
    .groups = 'drop' # 释放分组
  )

# 绘制热图
ggplot(heatmap_data, aes(x = TMB_Group, y = Gene_Status, fill = Death_Rate)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", size = 1) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("N=", Count, "\nRate=", round(Death_Rate, 2))), 
            color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#2166AC", high = "#B2182B", name = "Death Rate") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Clinical Risk Landscape: TMB vs Genomic Status",
       subtitle = "Darker red indicates higher mortality rate",
       x = "TMB Level", y = "Mutation Profile")
```

```{r}
# 3. 伴随突变分析：STK11 突变者还常伴随哪些基因？

# 找出 STK11 突变组中最频繁的前 10 个突变基因 (排除 STK11 自己)
stk11_mutant_ids <- surv_immuno[STK11 == 1, Tumor_Sample_Barcode]
top_co_mutations <- muta_sub[Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% stk11_mutant_ids & Hugo_Symbol != "STK11", 
                             .(Freq = .N), by = Hugo_Symbol][order(-Freq)][1:10]

# 绘制条形图
ggplot(top_co_mutations, aes(x = reorder(Hugo_Symbol, Freq), y = Freq, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma") +
  labs(title = "Top Co-occurring Mutations in STK11-Mutant Samples",
       x = "Gene Symbol", y = "Number of Samples")
```
```{r}
# 修复 Immuno_Score 并重新运行分析
library(timeROC)

# 1. 确保 STK11 和 KEAP1 是数值型（0 或 1）
surv_immuno[, STK11 := as.numeric(STK11)]
surv_immuno[, KEAP1 := as.numeric(KEAP1)]
# 统一 TMB 分组：High=1, Low=0
surv_immuno[, TMB_Binary := ifelse(TMB_Group == "High TMB", 1, 0)]

# 2. 重新计算 Immuno_Score
# 我们直接使用 Cox 模型生成的系数来加权。如果系数提取失败，我们使用经验系数：
# TMB 是保护因素(负风险)，STK11/KEAP1 是危险因素(正风险)
# 这里重新跑一次简洁版 Cox 确保拿到 weights
tmp_cox <- coxph(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~ TMB_Binary + STK11 + KEAP1, data = surv_immuno)
w <- coef(tmp_cox)

# 计算得分 (线性预测值)
surv_immuno[, Immuno_Score := (TMB_Binary * w["TMB_Binary"]) +
                               (STK11 * w["STK11"]) +
                               (KEAP1 * w["KEAP1"])]

# 3. 再次检查是否还有缺失值
cat("修复后 Immuno_Score 缺失数:", sum(is.na(surv_immuno$Immuno_Score)), "\n")

# 1. 运行 timeROC，将 iid 设为 FALSE
ROC_res <- timeROC(T = surv_immuno$OS_MONTHS,
                   delta = surv_immuno$OS_STATUS_NUM,
                   marker = surv_immuno$Immuno_Score,
                   cause = 1, weighting = "marginal",
                   times = c(12, 24, 36),
                   iid = FALSE)

# 2. 绘图（现在应该瞬间就出来了）
plot(ROC_res, time = 24, col = "#B2182B", lwd = 3, title = FALSE)
abline(a=0, b=1, lty=2, col="grey")
legend("bottomright",
       legend = paste("24-month AUC =", round(ROC_res$AUC[2], 2)),
       col = "#B2182B", lwd = 3, bty = "n")
title("Integrated Model: 2-Year Survival Prediction")
```
```{r}
# 分组 TMB 比较：单突变 vs 双突变
surv_immuno[, Detail_Group := "Wild-type"]
surv_immuno[STK11 == 1 & KEAP1 == 0, Detail_Group := "STK11 Only"]
surv_immuno[STK11 == 0 & KEAP1 == 1, Detail_Group := "KEAP1 Only"]
surv_immuno[STK11 == 1 & KEAP1 == 1, Detail_Group := "Double Mut"]

ggplot(surv_immuno, aes(x = reorder(Detail_Group, TMB_Score, median), y = log2(TMB_Score + 1), fill = Detail_Group)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "TMB Signature by Mutation Combination",
       x = "Mutational Pattern", y = "log2(TMB Score + 1)") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1")
```

```{r}
# 最终优化：解决生存曲线 Risk Table 变形与清晰度
library(survminer)
library(ggplot2)

# 1. 确保标签简短且统一
surv_immuno[, Plot_Group := paste0(
  ifelse(TMB_Group == "High TMB", "H-TMB", "L-TMB"), " | ", 
  ifelse(STK11 + KEAP1 > 0, "Mut", "WT")
)]

# 2. 拟合模型
fit_plot <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~ Plot_Group, data = surv_immuno)

# 3. 高清绘图设置
p <- ggsurvplot(fit_plot, data = surv_immuno,
           pval = TRUE,
           pval.coord = c(0, 0.1),       # 调整P值位置，防止被曲线遮挡
           palette = "jco",
           risk.table = TRUE,
           
           # --- 布局核心修正 ---
           risk.table.height = 0.30,      # 表格占整个图的高度比例
           risk.table.y.text = TRUE,      # 显示左侧分组标签
           risk.table.y.text.col = FALSE, # 统一使用黑色标签，增加可读性
           
           # --- 字体与样式修正 ---
           tables.theme = theme_cleantable(), # 使用最清洁的主题
           # 重点：通过 element_text 调整左侧标签的字体大小和位置
           tables.y.text = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold", color = "black"), 
           
           # 调整主图样式
           ggtheme = theme_light() + 
                     theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
                           axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
                           legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
                           # 重点：给整个绘图区域留白，特别是左边(L)
                           plot.margin = margin(t=10, r=20, b=10, l=40, unit="pt")), 
           
           # 其他元数据
           legend.labs = c("H-TMB | Mut", "H-TMB | WT", "L-TMB | Mut", "L-TMB | WT"),
           title = "NSCLC Survival: TMB & STK11/KEAP1 Status",
           xlab = "Time (Months)",
           ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
           break.time.by = 20           # 每20个月一个刻度，减少横轴拥挤
)

# 4. 关键：修正 Risk Table 内部标签的垂直间距，防止重叠
# 有时 ggsurvplot 会默认拉伸表格文字，通过修改 ggplot 对象解决
p$table <- p$table + theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))

# 打印
print(p)

# 5. 保存为高清 PDF 或 PNG (建议放入 LaTeX 用 PDF)
ggsave("Survival_Final_Optimized.pdf", plot = p$plot, width = 8, height = 7)
```

```{r}
# 海报展示：多组学景观矩阵 (Visualizing Top Samples)
library(tidyr)

# 选出 TMB 最高的 100 个样本做代表展示
poster_samples <- surv_immuno %>%
  arrange(desc(TMB_Score)) %>%
  head(100) %>%
  select(Tumor_Sample_Barcode, STK11, KEAP1, TMB_Group, OS_STATUS)

# 转换格式
poster_long <- pivot_longer(poster_samples, cols = c(STK11, KEAP1), names_to = "Gene", values_to = "Mut")

ggplot(poster_long, aes(x = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, y = Gene, fill = factor(Mut))) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "#F0F0F0", "1" = "#E41A1C"), labels = c("WT", "Mutant"), name = "Status") +
  facet_grid(. ~ TMB_Group, scales = "free_x", space = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(title = "Mutational Landscape across Top TMB Samples",
       x = "Individual Patients (Ranked by TMB)", y = "Critical Genes")
```

```{r}
# 进阶分析：引入 TMB 与 STK11/KEAP1 的交互项 (Interaction)

# 1. 确保变量为因子格式，并设置正确的参考组
surv_immuno$TMB_Group <- factor(surv_immuno$TMB_Group)
if("Low TMB" %in% levels(surv_immuno$TMB_Group)) {
  surv_immuno$TMB_Group <- relevel(surv_immuno$TMB_Group, ref = "Low TMB")
}

# 2. 构建带交互项的 Cox 模型
# 使用 TMB_Group * STK11 表示：TMB效应 + STK11效应 + TMB与STK11的协同/拮抗效应
cox_interaction <- coxph(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS_NUM) ~ 
                           TMB_Group * STK11 + 
                           TMB_Group * KEAP1 + 
                           AGE + GENDER, 
                         data = surv_immuno)

# 3. 查看统计结果
# 重点关注末尾带有 ":" 的项，如 TMB_GroupHigh TMB:STK11
summary_res <- summary(cox_interaction)
print(summary_res)

# 4. 绘制森林图
# 注意：包含交互项后，ggforest 的展示会变得复杂，建议增加高度
ggforest(cox_interaction, data = surv_immuno, 
         main = "Hazard Ratio with Interaction Effects")

# 5. 【可选】计算预测值以验证“中和效应”
# 比较在 TMB High 情况下，Mutation 带来的额外风险增量
```
